entities.name: GLADIOLUS
entities.description: A flowering plant whose corms are susceptible to rot caused by Fusarium.

entities.name: FUSARIUM
entities.description: A genus of fungi responsible for causing rot in gladiolus corms.

entities.name: ROT OF GLADIOLUS CORMS
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the corms of gladiolus plants.

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC CUP ASSAY METHOD
entities.description: An in-vitro screening technique used to evaluate the efficacy of fungicides.

entities.name: BENLATE
entities.description: A fungicide containing benomyl, identified as one of the most effective against Fusarium.

entities.name: MANEB
entities.description: A fungicide identified as one of the most effective against Fusarium.

entities.name: BAVISTIN
entities.description: A fungicide containing carbendazim, most effective when combined with Difolatan.

entities.name: DIFOLATAN
entities.description: A fungicide containing captafol, effective when combined with Bavistin or Maneb.

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control fungal growth and diseases.
